name: memoryvault-kit
description: Personal memory layer over a folder of markdown notes. BM25 + entity-graph retrieval with a lint+heal+audit quality loop. Built and measured against a 220-question personal eval set.
author: Ayush Mall

skills.name: memory-ask
skills.description: Search the user's vault — call this before answering ANY question about their work

skills.name: memory-save
skills.description: Persist a new memory to the vault when the user says 'remember this'

skills.name: memory-audit
skills.description: Vault health check — counts, dead wikilinks, orphans

skills.name: memory-refresh
skills.description: Ingest last 24-48h from connected MCPs (Granola, Slack, Calendar, ...)

skills.name: memory-heal
skills.description: Auto-fix safe issues — backfill aliases, resolve dead wikilinks, mark orphans

skills.name: memory-ingest
skills.description: Bulk-import a folder of markdown notes into the vault
